ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändare (Bolon AB, Sweden), mottagare (MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, Dubai, UAE), varubeskrivning med artikelnummer, kvantiteter och ursprungsland (Sweden) kan alla verifieras. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.debug_explanation: Document pair: Certificate SEG-23D-821239 vs Invoice 148536. Both issued by Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12, SE-523 90 Ulricehamn, Sweden. Consignee: MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, PO Box 450016, Dubai, UAE. All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. No LC exception detected. All article numbers (102739, 106949, 103707) found in invoice. Quantities verified via article-level matching and summation (3D). Origin SE confirmed per article line in invoice. Certificate references Invoice 148536 which matches the invoice number.

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. ICC Certificate of Origin format with West Sweden Chamber of Commerce stamp.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Single page invoice from Bolon AB.

criteria_met: Invoice reference match: Certificate remarks 'Invoice 148536' matches invoice number 'INVOICE 148536'
Consignor match: Certificate consignor 'Bolon AB' matches invoice issuer 'Bolon AB'
Consignee match: Certificate consignee 'MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC' matches invoice address 'MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC'

rule_activation.lc_validation_note: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-23D-821239' does not contain any LC banking term reference.

locations: Invoice header/branding: 'BOLON' at top of page
Invoice sender line: 'Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12' below header
Sender block at bottom of invoice: 'Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12, 523 90 Ulricehamn, SWEDEN'

candidates.normalized_text: mtr squared tiles & flooring materials trading llc

checkpoints.certificate_value: Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12, SE-523 90, ULRICEHAMN, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12, SE-523 90 Ulricehamn, Sweden (sender block); BOLON (header branding)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Bolon AB' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'Bolon AB' found in invoice header ('Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12'), sender block ('Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12, 523 90 Ulricehamn, SWEDEN'), and EORI block ('Bolon AB SE5562024363'). Direct match as invoice issuer. No need to proceed to 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice issuer country: SWEDEN (sender block). Also confirmed by VAT No prefix 'SE' and IBAN prefix 'SE'.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice as invoice issuer.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Bolon AB' is the direct issuer of the invoice. The name appears in the invoice header, sender block, and EORI/VAT blocks. Country 'Sweden' confirmed via explicit address and VAT prefix SE. Direct MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, PO Box 450016, Warehouse No. 4, Plot 71, 24B Street, Al Quoz Ind Area, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
checkpoints.invoice_value: MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, PO Box 450016, Warehouse No. 4, Plot 71, 24B Street, Al Quoz Ind. Area, AE- Dubai, United Arab Emirates (Invoice Address block)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice. Invoice contains 'Invoice Address' block with party name.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice Address (137822): 'MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, PO Box 450016, Warehouse No. 4, Plot 71, 24B Street, Al Quoz Ind. Area, AE- Dubai, United Arab Emirates'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice-to name.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC' is identical in both documents after normalization (case, spacing).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: United Arab Emirates. Invoice: United Arab Emirates.

rules_applied.description: Invoice Address (primary billing field) used for consignee verification.
Name verification – exact match after normalization.
Country verification – United Arab Emirates matches.
Address differences ('Al Quoz Ind Area' vs 'Al Quoz Ind. Area', 'Dubai' vs 'AE- Dubai') are minor formatting variations and do not affect MATCH per 4.2.4 (address differences do not cause MISMATCH).

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignee 'MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC' is found exactly in the Invoice Address block of the invoice. The company name is identical. Country 'United Arab Emirates' matches. Minor address formatting differences (abbreviation of 'Ind.' vs 'Ind', 'AE-' prefix on Dubai) are not grounds for MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Art nr 102739 Slate Artisan 200 cm; Art nr 106949 A4 sample; Art nr 103707 Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm
checkpoints.invoice_value: 102739 Slate Artisan 200 cm (lines 10, 20); 106949 No. 01 Sample A4 (line 40); 103707 Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm (line 10, second order)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate lists three article numbers: 102739, 106949, 103707. Verify each in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: All three article numbers found exactly in invoice. 102739 on invoice lines 10 and 20 (first order section). 106949 on invoice line 40. 103707 on invoice line 10 (second order section).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Slate Artisan 200 cm'. Invoice: 'Slate Artisan 200 cm'.

Certificate: 'A4 sample'. Invoice: 'No. 01 Sample A4'. Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning: 'A4 sample'. Invoice contains both 'A4' and 'Sample'. The core product identity terms 'A4' and 'sample' are present in the invoice description.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Article number 102949 matches exactly, and the identity-bearing terms 'A4' and 'sample' are both present in the invoice text. 'No. 01' is a non-identity-bearing prefix (internal reference per 4.3.4). Reordering of 'A4 sample' → 'Sample A4' is a minor word order variation but the article number match via Priority 1 is conclusive.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm'. Invoice: 'Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm'.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Article number verification. All three article numbers (102739, 106949, 103707) found exactly in invoice.
Identity-bearing main designation verified for each article.
Non-identity-bearing additions ('No. 01' prefix in invoice for article 106949) do not cause MISMATCH.

checkpoints.motivation: All three articles in the certificate are verified via article number match (Priority 1). Article numbers 102739, 106949, and 103707 are found exactly in the invoice. Text descriptions match: 'Slate Artisan 200 cm' is identical; 'A4 sample' corresponds to 'No. 01 Sample A4' where 'No. 01' is a non-identity-bearing prefix and both 'A4' and 'sample' are present; 'Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm' is identical. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 480 pcs / 120 m². Invoice line (second order, line 10): 480,0 pcs / 120,00 m².
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 480 pcs = 480.0 pcs, 120 m² = 120.00 m². Direct identification.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 40 lm / 80 m². Invoice has two lines for 102739: line 10 (25,0 lm / 50,00 m²) and line 20 (15,0 lm / 30,00 m²). No single line matches 40 lm.
comparison_steps.result: No direct match. Proceed to exceptions.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.5 – Undantag 3D: Summering av flera rader inom samma faktura for article 102739
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 40 lm / 80 m². Invoice lines 10 + 20 for article 102739: 25.0 lm + 15.0 lm = 40.0 lm; 50.00 m² + 30.00 m² = 80.00 m². Same article number 102739 on both lines. Same invoice. Same unit (lm and m²).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – All conditions for 3D met: (1) certificate states total qty for article 102739; (2) two invoice lines sum to the total; (3) same invoice and reference; (4) same units; (5) no irrelevant rows included; (6) both rows for same article 102739 Slate Artisan 200 cm; (7) no unit conversion needed; (8) sum matches exactly (40.0 lm = 40 lm, 80.00 m² = 80 m²).

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll – direct identification for articles 103707 and 106949.
Undantag 3D – summation of two invoice lines for article 102739: 25.0+15.0=40.0 lm and 50.00+30.00=80.00 m².
Quantity units verified: lm (linear meters), pcs (pieces), m² (square meters) are explicit units.

checkpoints.motivation: For article 103707: 480 pcs / 120 m² matches directly (480.0 pcs / 120.00 m² in invoice). For article 106949: 10 pcs matches directly (10.0 pcs in invoice). For article 102739: certificate states 40 lm / 80 m². Invoice has two lines for same article 102739 (25.0 lm + 15.0 lm = 40.0 lm; 50.00 m² + 30.00 m² = 80.00 m²). Summation under exception 3D applies — all conditions met. All quantities verified. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Country of Origin SE (per article line); EU preferential origin (declaration text)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains 'Country of Origin SE' on every article line (lines 10, 20, 40 first order; line 10 second order). Also contains EU preferential origin declaration.
comparison_steps.result: Origin field identified: 'Country of Origin SE' per article line.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Sweden = SE after ISO code normalization.

comparison_steps.description: All invoice lines show 'Country of Origin SE'. Single origin country. Certificate states single origin 'Sweden'.

Invoice also contains EU preferential origin declaration. Sweden is EU member state. Certificate states 'Sweden' in box 3 and certificate is an EU Certificate of Origin. No conflict — SE (Sweden) is an EU member state, consistent with EU preferential origin declaration.
comparison_steps.result: No conflict. Sweden = SE = EU member. All consistent.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via 'Country of Origin SE' on each invoice article line.
Uniform origin – all lines show SE.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states origin 'Sweden' in box 3. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin SE' on every article line. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden — verified after normalization. All articles share the same origin. Additionally, the EU preferential origin declaration is consistent with Sweden as an EU member state. MATCH.

evidence.location: Invoice lines 10 and 20 (first order), description column
EU origin declaration text (first order section)
evidence.raw_text: The exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No. SE/BOS/000954) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of EU preferential origin.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number 'SEG-23D-821239' does not contain LC banking term. No field labeled 'L/C No.' or similar.

Document A identified as Certificate of Origin (ICC format, EU). Document B identified as Commercial Invoice (INVOICE 148536). Certificate references 'Invoice 148536' which matches invoice number. Consignor 'Bolon AB' is invoice issuer. Valid pair.
All three criteria met: (1) Invoice reference 148536 matches, (2) Consignor Bolon AB matches invoice issuer, (3) Consignee MTR Squared matches invoice-to.
Bolon AB found directly as invoice issuer in header, sender block, and EORI block.
Sweden = Sweden (also confirmed via SE VAT prefix and SE IBAN prefix).

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee priority order – Invoice Address identified
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Invoice contains 'Invoice Address' block (137822) with MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC. This is the primary billing field.
United Arab Emirates = United Arab Emirates.
All three article numbers (102739, 106949, 103707) found exactly in invoice.
Slate Artisan 200 cm – identical. A4 sample – identity terms present (article number match is primary). Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm – identical.
'No. 01' prefix on invoice for article 106949 is a non-identity-bearing internal reference.

rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH for 103707 and 106949; no direct match for 102739
rule_evaluation_log.detail: 480 pcs / 120 m² matches directly for 103707. 10 pcs matches directly for 106949. 40 lm not found in single invoice line for 102739.
No MT/KG conversion needed. Quantities in lm, pcs, m².

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Undantag 3D – Summation of multiple rows same invoice
rule_evaluation_log.detail: For article 102739: two invoice lines (25.0 lm + 15.0 lm = 40.0 lm; 50.00 m² + 30.00 m² = 80.00 m²). All 3D conditions met: same article, same invoice, same units, exact match.
'Country of Origin SE' found on all four article lines in invoice.
Sweden = SE (ISO alpha-2 code). Standard normalization.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee MISMATCH due to 'Al Quoz Ind Area' vs 'Al Quoz Ind. Area'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Minor address formatting difference (abbreviation dot). Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only company name and country matter.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Goods description MISMATCH for article 106949 due to 'A4 sample' vs 'No. 01 Sample A4'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Article number 106949 matches exactly (Priority 1). 'No. 01' is a non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4. Both 'A4' and 'sample' are present in the invoice description. MATCH via article number verification.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Quantity MISMATCH for article 102739 because no single line shows 40 lm
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Exception 3D (summation of multiple rows within same invoice) applies. Two lines for article 102739: 25.0 + 15.0 = 40.0 lm, 50.00 + 30.00 = 80.00 m². All conditions met. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MANUAL_REVIEW due to gross weight in certificate (271 kg + 491 kg) not verifiable in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The pallet gross weights (271 kg, 491 kg) appear in box 6 (goods description / packaging info) as shipping/packaging data. The verifiable quantities in box 7 are the article-level quantities (40 lm, 10 pcs, 480 pcs). Per 4.4.2.1, verification is based on box 7 quantities. Box 7 quantities have been verified successfully.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga kontrollpunkter har verifierats som överensstämmande. Certifikatet och fakturan avser samma avsändare (Bolon AB, Sverige), samma mottagare (MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, Dubai, UAE), samma varor med matchande artikelnummer och beskrivningar, korrekta kvantiteter samt ursprungsland Sverige (SE).

sections.certificate_value: Bolon AB, Industrivägen 12, SE-523 90, ULRICEHAMN, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning – consignor är fakturans utställare
sections.motivation: Bolon AB finns som fakturans utställare i sidhuvud, avsändarblock och EORI-block. Land Sverige verifierat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, PO Box 450016, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
sections.invoice_value: MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring Materials Trading LLC, PO Box 450016, AE- Dubai, United Arab Emirates
sections.motivation: Identiskt företagsnamn i certifikatets mottagarfält och fakturans Invoice Address-block. Land United Arab Emirates matchar. Smärre adressformatering (Ind Area vs Ind. Area) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: Art nr 102739 Slate Artisan 200 cm; Art nr 106949 A4 sample; Art nr 103707 Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm
sections.invoice_value: 102739 Slate Artisan 200 cm; 106949 No. 01 Sample A4; 103707 Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm
sections.motivation: Alla tre artikelnummer (102739, 106949, 103707) finns exakt i fakturan. Varubeskrivningar matchar. 'No. 01' i fakturan för artikel 106949 är en intern referens som inte påverkar produktidentitet.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering samt undantag 3D (summering av rader inom samma faktura) för artikel 102739
sections.motivation: Artikel 103707 och 106949 matchar direkt. Artikel 102739 har två rader i fakturan (25+15=40 lm, 50+30=80 m²) som summeras enligt undantag 3D. Alla kvantiteter verifierade.
Certifikatet anger ursprungsland Sweden. Fakturan anger 'Country of Origin SE' på samtliga artikelrader. SE är ISO-koden för Sverige. Enhetligt ursprung bekräftat.

output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_detail: All applicable checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85 (lowest: 0.96 for quantity). Confidence floor for IDENTICAL met.
